highlights: Built a Copilot subagent workflow that pulls Jira tickets and related documents, filters them with team domain knowledge, runs AI-assisted log analysis, and sends RCA drafts to customer support — being shaped into a VM/cloud-hosted web service.
Build and maintain C++ backend services and frontend administrative tools used around business-critical workflows.

Work with architects and product managers to sort out design dependencies before implementation; authored high-level and low-level design documents for a monitoring system using Grafana and Prometheus.
Built analytics algorithms in modern C++ for GPU architecture evaluation, with strict latency and throughput targets on large datasets.
Refactored 1,500+ source files into a decoupled MVC architecture using C++17 OOP patterns; took ownership of untouched modules and reduced regressions and bugs by 60%.
Wrote automated regression and performance tests in Python and tracked down multi-platform defects across large codebases.
Reduced system processing time by 15% through targeted algorithmic optimizations.
Led code reviews during production migration to C#/.NET Core.
Wrote a multi-threaded object detection algorithm in C++ for real-time throughput in an industrial production environment.
